tell me about gagan sethi: Gagan Sethi is a results-driven global executive with over three decades of leadership experience in the FinTech and InsurTech industries. He holds an Engineering degree in Computer Science and a Master’s degree in Business Management, and has held several senior leadership positions, including Chief Technology Officer (CTO), Chief Information Officer (CIO), and Chief Information Security Officer (CISO).
